caption: A man with dark hair pulled back and wearing glasses performs music in front of a tan, slatted wall. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt under a black vest that features blue floral embroidery on the shoulders and red floral designs on the lower front. He stands behind a microphone on a black stand and holds an acoustic guitar. The word "ORCA" appears in white, uppercase letters on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a nearly static position, leaning slightly toward the microphone with his eyes looking downward. There is very little movement between the frames, though his facial expression shifts slightly and his posture adjusts marginally as he continues his performance.
